hypothesis: Applying a 2 Hz square‑wave current modulation cycling between 150 and 350 mA cm−2 (50% duty cycle; same 249 mA cm−2 average) in the reactive carbon electrolyzer will increase reactor yield by at least 15% relative to steady 249 mA cm−2 operation under the 1.5 M KHCO3/0.75 M K2CO3, 3 M K+ electrolyte conditions.
